caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" and a matching green baseball cap sits before a professional microphone with a pop filter. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. Clothing racks and a black chair are also visible. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos appear: a black circle containing "NINE" and "SINE" on the left, and red text reading "NOBODY REALLY HOT" on the right. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and mouth while remaining in the same seated position. The background and equipment remain static throughout the sequence.
